section_miscategorizations.text: Hemoglobin A1c and CBC blood tests ordered. Chem-12 blood test ordered.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are orders being placed, not existing lab results; they represent planned diagnostic workup and belong in the Plan section.

The Findings section already documents a completed right elbow x-ray result; placing a new order for the same x-ray in the Plan conflicts with that and suggests the imaging has not yet been done, which is misleading.
